title: Ember Lance
content: A precise fire spell that launches a concentrated spear of heat.

title: Mist Veil
content: A utility spell that blankets a corridor in cold fog and blocks sight lines.

title: Iron Boar
content: A heavily armored beast known for charging through shields.

title: Cover And Position
content: Use terrain to improve defense and deny direct lines of attack.

title: Field Compass
content: A durable navigation tool for long overland travel and route planning.
